title: Question: How does --noassert improve performance?
body:
---


Author Name: **Jonathon Donaldson**
Original Redmine Message: 1418 from https://www.veripool.org



---

I assume the --noassert option disables the testing of SV assertions? The manual does not actually say anywhere what the --noassert option does so I'm not 100% sure.

If it simply disables the checking of assertions then will it really have any benefit if the only assertions in the design are within an 'initial' block that are only run once at time T=0 and then never checked again?
